_note: Do not store API keys in this file. Use environment variables or a local .env file excluded from git.

local_fast.description: Quick classification, triage, simple summaries, data entry helpers
local_fast.privacy: local — no data leaves the machine

local_coder.description: Code analysis, diff review, script generation, implementation review
local_coder.privacy: local — no data leaves the machine

local_critic.description: Scope review, safety review, risk detection, sensitive-file detection
local_critic.privacy: local — no data leaves the machine

deepseek_long_context.description: Long-context reasoning: cross-file analysis, multi-layer synthesis, complex diagnosis
deepseek_long_context.privacy: EXTERNAL API — only sends files explicitly included in context_pack.md
deepseek_long_context.approval_note: Founder must review context_pack.md before sending to DeepSeek

external_implementation_manual.description: Sensitive product implementation — Rust, auth, payment, core logic
external_implementation_manual.privacy: EXTERNAL — founder manually selects and pastes only the v11_mission_package.md
external_implementation_manual.approval_note: Founder always manually sends the mission package — never automated
